name: CohortUploadRequest
description: CohortUploadRequest schema from Amplitude Behavioral Cohorts API

name.description: The name of the cohort to create or update.

ids.description: Array of user_id or amplitude_id values to include in the cohort.

owner.description: The email address of the cohort owner.

existing_cohort_id.description: If provided, updates the existing cohort with this ID instead of creating a new one.
